name: GOLFTEC Wichita
address: 3101 N Rock Rd Suite 155, Wichita, KS 67226
about: GOLFTEC provides high-tech golf instruction and practice using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. Their lessons are personalized to help golfers improve faster by identifying swing issues and building custom improvement plans. The venues offer simulator bays for practice, on-course lessons, and custom club fitting services with the goal of delivering data-driven feedback for both beginners and experienced players. They operate with certified PGA coaches and provide a structured approach to golf improvement through lessons, practice, and fitting services.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors for detailed swing analysis
Data-driven personalized lesson plans tailored to individual goals and skill levels
Access to professional PGA coaches for structured improvement and on-course application

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for fitting and lessons to measure ball flight and swing data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides club rentals and also offers custom club fitting services where you can be fitted and purchase clubs directly through them.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services being available at GOLFTEC locations. It appears to be a focused instruction and practice facility without dining options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC specializes in instruction and practice rather than full 18-hole rounds. Their sessions focus on skill development through technology-enabled practice and lessons rather than simulated play.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth with advanced technology and coaching tailored to help young golfers improve their skills in a structured environment.
